title: Elven Scout applies Atk plus six while equipped

plan.title: Elven Scout applies Atk plus six while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Elven Scout to a modifier-zero primary creature, run a battle, and verify the printed Atk bonus.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Atk bonus comes only from Elven Scout.

steps: Player 1 plays Elven Scout and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +6 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the Atk bonus applies only while Elven Scout remains equipped.
riskNotes: Atk bonus is verified through battle damage output.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Elven Scout Atk equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
